title: RBI invites comments on Draft RBI (Branch Authorisation) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI proposes a revamped Business Correspondent framework with clearer classifications and simplified norms. The draft aims to enhance financial inclusion and improve service delivery in rural areas.
The post RBI invites comments on Draft RBI (Branch Authorisation) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
